description: A commercial art print for the Absolut Vodka advertising campaign, created by Edward Ruscha. The image shows a clear glass vodka bottle tilted at an angle against a grey background, casting a large dramatic shadow that resembles a howling wolf or coyote. Below the image, bold black text reads 'ABSOLUT RUSCHA.' in the trademark style of the long-running Absolut artist collaboration series. The composition is stark and monochromatic, relying on the interplay between the transparent bottle and its evocative shadow.
